subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Lord of the worlds, and commandeth you to observe righteousness and piety, and forbiddeth you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله رب العالمین و یامرکم بالبر و التقوی ینهئکم عن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @contention and conflict, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
